required_tools.name: github-mcp
required_tools.reason: All projects use GitHub for source code management and collaboration.

required_tools.name: kubernetes-mcp
required_tools.reason: Infrastructure context indicates Kubernetes operators are deployed, and Task 1 explicitly involves Kubernetes/Helm deployments.

required_tools.name: postgresql-mcp
required_tools.reason: Multiple tasks (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) involve PostgreSQL database schema definition, interaction, and deployment.

required_tools.name: redis-mcp
required_tools.reason: Tasks 1 and 3 involve deploying and integrating Redis/Valkey for caching and rate limiting.

required_tools.name: s3-mcp
required_tools.reason: Tasks 1 and 3 involve provisioning and integrating S3/R2 for asset storage.

required_tools.name: cloudflare-mcp
required_tools.reason: Task 1 involves setting up Cloudflare Tunnel, and infrastructure context shows Cloudflare Tunnel CRDs.

required_tools.name: terraform-mcp
required_tools.reason: Task 1 explicitly mentions using Terraform for provisioning S3/R2.

required_tools.name: argocd-mcp
required_tools.reason: ArgoCD services are present in the cluster, indicating its use for GitOps deployments, particularly for infrastructure setup in Task 1.

recommended_tools.name: grafana-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: Recommended for visualizing metrics and logs from the deployed services and infrastructure for better observability.

recommended_tools.name: loki-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: Recommended for centralized logging of the deployed services, aiding in debugging and monitoring.

recommended_tools.name: prometheus-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: Recommended for collecting metrics from the deployed services and infrastructure, essential for performance monitoring and alerting.
